'''zangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pygostole|pygostole]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ng-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pygostole|pygostole]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zangaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zængækæth|zængækæth]] || [[word:zængækæj|zængækæj]] || [[word:zængækæsh|zængækæsh]] || [[word:zængækæ|zængækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zangangakath|zangangakath]] || [[word:zangangakaj|zangangakaj]] || [[word:zangangakash|zangangakash]] || [[word:zangangaka|zangangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zangakath|zangakath]] || [[word:zangakaj|zangakaj]] || [[word:zangakash|zangakash]] || [[word:zangaka|zangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zangafkath|zangafkath]] || [[word:zangafkaj|zangafkaj]] || [[word:zangafkash|zangafkash]] || [[word:zangafkaf|zangafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zangakatha|zangakatha]] || [[word:zangakaja|zangakaja]] || [[word:zangakasha|zangakasha]] || [[word:zangakaka|zangakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zangakath|zangakath]] || [[word:zangakaj|zangakaj]] || [[word:zangakash|zangakash]] || [[word:zangaka|zangaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zangakathal|zangakathal]] || [[word:zangakajal|zangakajal]] || [[word:zangakashal|zangakashal]] || [[word:zangakakal|zangakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zangakathatha|zangakathatha]] || [[word:zangakajaja|zangakajaja]] || [[word:zangakashasha|zangakashasha]] || [[word:zangakaka|zangakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zangakathan|zangakathan]] || [[word:zangakajan|zangakajan]] || [[word:zangakashan|zangakashan]] || [[word:zangakakan|zangakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zangakathaoro|zangakathaoro]] || [[word:zangakajaoro|zangakajaoro]] || [[word:zangakashaoro|zangakashaoro]] || [[word:zangakakaoro|zangakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
